title: Romantic Saudi Arabian Steak Kebabs
description: A romantic Saudi Arabian dish featuring skirt steak, served with a side of molten cheese and spices, perfect for a low carb dinner
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium high heat
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, and black pepper
Add the skirt steak to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade
Thread the steak onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the steak reaches 130 degrees Fahrenheit
While the steak is cooking, heat the feta cheese in a small saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly, until melted and smooth
Serve the steak skewers with the molten feta cheese spooned over the top
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve immediately
